title: DELETE /api/weight/{id} — delete weight entry
description: Implement the endpoint to permanently delete a weight entry.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/weight/{id} returns 204 No Content on success
Returns 404 if entry does not exist
Returns 403 if entry belongs to a different user
Returns 401 if no valid JWT provided
Entry is permanently removed from the database

steps.details: In src/api/routers/weight.py, add DELETE /{entry_id} route with response_code=204. Handler: query db for WeightEntry with entry_id, if not found raise HTTPException(404), if entry.user_id != current_user.id raise HTTPException(403), call db.delete(entry) and db.commit(), return Response(status_code=204).

Create a weight entry, then DELETE /api/weight/{id} with valid JWT. Verify: status 204, no response body. Then GET /api/weight and verify the entry is gone. Try deleting the same entry again — verify 404. Try deleting another user's entry — verify 403.

technicalNotes: Return 204 No Content for successful delete — no response body
Import Response from fastapi to return an empty 204 response
